title: 'What was Sonam Raghuvanshi asked?': Police find chilling Google searches on Siya Goyal's phone
content: The investigation into Ketan Agrawal's murder has led Pune police to scrutinize Siya Goyal's internet activities for potential evidence. Notably, her search history includes queries tied to an ongoing conspiracy case involving Sonam Raghuvanshi. Authorities are also looking into allegations that Goyal and her supposed partner secretly wed ahead of the incident.

title: The mystery of 8: Why PM Modi mentioned this number in his Indonesia speech
content: Prime Minister Modi emphasized the number eight during his address to the Indian diaspora in Jakarta.  He noted numerical connections between India's Republic Day and President Prabowo's birthday.  The number eight holds significant cultural meaning in Indonesia, symbolizing prosperity and good fortune.  This visit saw twenty agreements signed, strengthening bilateral cooperation between the nations.  India will also assist in conserving the ancient Prambanan Temple, a shared heritage site.

title: India strengthens position as investment destination; FDI rises by 44% to $39 billion in 2025
content: South Asia witnessed a sharp rise in FDI inflows, which climbed from $34 billion to $46 billion, largely driven by India, where inflows expanded to $39 billion, the report noted. At the same time, UNCTAD observed that project-related indicators suggested a more cautious investment environment despite the increase in overall inflows.

title: Delhi-NCR office leasing hits record high; flexible operators account for 45%
content: Flexible workspace operators are now leading Delhi-NCR's office leasing activity. This trend reflects a growing preference for agile and adaptable office portfolios. Companies are increasingly adopting a "core plus flex" model for their workspace needs. India's overall office market also saw record absorption during the quarter. Demand remains strong for high-quality, sustainable, and flexible office assets.

title: Deutsche Bank exec on AI & jobs: Slightly skewed by what economic history tells us
content: Jim Reid of Deutsche Bank sees AI boosting productivity significantly over time.  He believes historical innovation shows technology ultimately creates more jobs.  Businesses will need years to fully integrate AI for maximum benefits.  Investors are watching AI infrastructure spending and semiconductor stock performance.  Reid acknowledges potential market risks but points to long-term human innovation.

title: 'Choice is obvious': De Villiers says Sooryavanshi may choose 'easier' T20 over Tests
content: Speaking on TOI Sports' Bombay Sports Exchange Podcast, de Villiers said the growing appeal of T20 cricket could influence young players like Sooryavanshi when deciding the direction of their careers.

title: Virginia county manager: Electricity rates to rise sharply from July 1
content: As the tech landscape evolves with AI data centers, electricity costs are soaring. Henrico County, Virginia, has announced a staggering 25% hike in electricity bills for government facilities, prompting local officials to urge power conservation among their employees. Residents are also feeling the pinch, with some facing bill doubles. This phenomenon underscores the mounting pressure on community resources amid the rapid expansion of data centers.

title: India's economy passed the Iran war test. Could El Nino spoil the party?
content: Economists say that the world’s fastest growing economy may even end up clocking a 7% GDP growth number this year. But, domestically a poor monsoon caused by El Nino is painting a grim picture for inflation. Is the worst really over for the Indian economy?

title: Scientists thickened Arctic ice with seawater, but there is a big catch
content: Scientists tested spraying seawater onto Arctic ice, which showed promising initial results. The treated ice became thicker and more reflective, resisting summer melting effectively. This method offers an alternative to controversial geoengineering approaches for ice preservation. While promising, researchers note significant challenges for large-scale implementation across the Arctic. Further work is essential before this technique can be considered for broader application.

title: $88M LA mansion once eyed by Jennifer Lopez sells for less than half
content: The Jennifer Lopez-admired Holmby Hills estate is now under contract after many years. This lavish property, formerly owned by Max Azria, had a steep price reduction. Jennifer Lopez had previously considered purchasing the grand estate on two separate occasions. The 2.8-acre compound features extensive gardens and a glass-enclosed tennis court. The deal has not yet closed, and the final sale price remains confidential.

title: World's largest asset management firm CEO is worried about how Mamdani is running NY
content: BlackRock CEO Larry Fink voiced concerns about New York City's business climate. He noted that 47% of city tax revenue comes from the top 1% of taxpayers. Fink stated that inadequate services do not justify the current tax burden for residents. He believes economic growth should be prioritized over tax policy by policymakers. Fink suggested that BlackRock might deploy US resources elsewhere if conditions weaken.

title: 'Serviced vehicles not facing difficulty': Hardeep Puri rejects engine damage claims over E20 fuel
content: Hardeep Singh Puri dismissed social media claims about E20 petrol as misinterpretation.  He stated that compatible vehicles and manufacturers report no significant issues.  India has used E15 fuel for over three years and E20 since last April.  Tests for E25 fuel are ongoing and will involve stakeholder consultations.  The government defends the ethanol program for its economic and environmental benefits.

title: El Nino impact: India’s hydropower generation sees steepest drop since Feb'24
content: Data from the India Meteorological Department showed that cumulative rainfall across the country was 38% below normal until July 1, largely due to the development of El Niño conditions over the Pacific Ocean, which affected the southwest monsoon running from June to September.

title: NHL Trade Rumors: Penguins' $30M Winger Linked to Canadiens Trade
content: Montreal's search for offensive help has naturally expanded into the trade market, bringing Rickard Rakell into the conversation after Elliotte Friedman's latest report. The veteran winger remains productive and carries a team-friendly contract, making him an appealing option on paper. However, his age, Pittsburgh's expected asking price, Montreal's long-term roster strategy, and Rakell's limited trade protection all complicate negotiations. At this stage, the connection appears to reflect routine due diligence rather than an indication that a deal is imminent, with other win-now contenders arguably better positioned to complete a trade.

title: Travis Kelce's controversial tweets and Taylor Swift's high school nostalgia
content: Online discussions emerged following Taylor Swift and Travis Kelce’s wedding ceremony especially now when they are not posting any wedding pictures. Resurfaced tweets from Kelce have drawn criticism for their alleged fatphobic and homophobic content. Swift’s apparent obsession with high school experiences is also a topic of public conversation. This fascination stems from her being homeschooled during her later high school years.

title: Cowboys Trade Rumors: Dallas linked to Raiders' $100M star in blockbuster deal
content: The Dallas Cowboys have been linked to Raiders star Maxx Crosby in a proposed blockbuster trade that would send George Pickens and a first-round pick to Las Vegas. Former scout Bryan Broaddus believes the deal would strengthen Dallas' defense, while the Raiders would address their receiver needs. Crosby's recovery from knee surgery remains the biggest factor. Raiders insider Vincent Bonsignore said several teams are closely monitoring his health ahead of potential trade discussions.

title: Why watching Cristiano Ronaldo has become painful, even for a Ronaldo fan
content: Ronaldo's career can be summed up in two pictures: the wink in the 2006 World Cup and the grimace in the 2026 one.

title: Seconds before disaster: CCTV shows Wayanad landslide sweeping away fuel tanker
content: A landslide near Wayanad's tunnel project site caused significant destruction and panic.  Two people died and seven others sustained injuries in the sudden debris flow.  Several individuals remain missing after the devastating incident occurred near Meenakshi Bridge.  Heavy rainfall and construction debris are under scrutiny as contributing factors.  Rescue operations are ongoing to locate the missing and clear the affected area.

title: Engaged to one, married to another: 'Double life' of Siya Goyal baffles Pune cops
content: Investigators are exploring the shocking possibility that Siya Goyal married Chetan Chaudhary in secret prior to her fiancé's mysterious death. Digital evidence indicates that this clandestine union took place months ahead of the tragic event. Despite planning her wedding with her fiancé, Goyal was allegedly orchestrating the murder. Authorities are scrutinizing her social media activity for potential evidence, leading to dramatic developments in the case surrounding the suspected secret marriage.

title: India urges US to reconsider proposed 12.5% tariff over 'forced labour' probe
content: India has asked the United States to withdraw proposed tariffs on its imports.  The nation argues the US lacks adequate evidence for its claims.  India's submission highlights a broad approach by the USTR investigation.  It states the current framework does not distort trade unfairly.  India remains open to dialogue and consultation on specific concerns.

title: France's Marine Le Pen sentenced to house arrest, 2027 presidential bid remains uncertain
content: Marine Le Pen faces house arrest and a ban from public office after a court ruling. This sentence could impact her presidential election bid scheduled for April and May 2027. The case involves allegations of misusing European Parliament funds for fake jobs between 2004 and 2016. Le Pen denies the charges and claims the party acted in good faith.

title: Heartbreak for Indian chess fans as Vidit falls in Mumbai; Bok seals EWC berth
content: Indian Grandmaster Vidit Gujrathi missed out on qualification for the Esports World Cup 2026 after losing 2-1 to Dutch Grandmaster Benjamin Bok in the India Rising: Road to EWC final in Mumbai. Vidit, who had hoped to redeem last year's near miss, said before the final that playing the Mumbai LAN and earning an EWC spot meant "a lot" to him.

title: UK court dismisses Prince Harry's privacy lawsuit against tabloid
content: Prince Harry and other celebrities lost privacy lawsuits against the Daily Mail publisher. The High Court dismissed their claims, stating unlawful information acquisition was not proven.  Associated Newspapers called the verdict an overwhelming victory for its journalists.  Harry has pursued multiple legal cases against British media publishers.  He previously won a case against the Daily Mirror publisher.

title: Govt portal breach: ED maps Sriki's darknet, crypto network in 3,500-page chargesheet
content: The Enforcement Directorate has unveiled a detailed charge sheet implicating three suspects: Srikrishna Ramesh, Robin Khandelwal, and Sunish Hegde. Ramesh allegedly orchestrated hacks, manipulating cryptocurrency exchanges and government systems to siphon off vast amounts. Hegde is accused of funding these operations and extorting from gaming platforms, while Khandelwal served as the financial link, laundering the illicit virtual assets.

title: Why tennis legend Roger Federer sat alone at Wimbledon Royal Box
content: Roger Federer remained in the Royal Box watching Wimbledon matches until late. Arthur Fery expressed surprise at seeing the tennis legend watching his contest. Fery's victory secured his place in the Wimbledon quarter-finals against Flavio Cobolli. Alexander Zverev's match against Jiri Lehecka was also ongoing that evening. Other notable attendees included Billie Jean King and Alessia Russo.

title: Erling Haaland reacts to Dragon Ball Z 'Majin Buu' meme amid FIFA World Cup 2026
content: Norway striker Erling Haaland is making headlines not only for his performances at the FIFA World Cup 2026 but also for a meme that has taken over social media once again. Football fans across X, Instagram and TikTok have been comparing the Manchester City star to Dragon Ball Z villain Majin Buu, especially the Super Buu version.

title: 148 newborn die in 3 months in Assam's Barak Valley; infra gaps under scanner
content: Barak Valley recorded 148 newborn deaths over three months. Cachar district reported the highest fatalities, followed by Sribhumi and Hailakandi. Deaths were mainly due to birth asphyxia and low birth weight. Rural healthcare infrastructure and delayed referrals worsened the situation. Investment in rural maternal and child healthcare is urgently needed.

title: 'Single game can't define greatness': Siraj pens emotional tribute for Ronaldo
content: Portugal's FIFA World Cup 2026 campaign concluded with a Round of 16 loss to Spain. Cristiano Ronaldo's illustrious World Cup career ended without the coveted trophy. Indian pacer Mohammed Siraj shared an emotional tribute to his idol on social media. Spain secured a quarterfinal spot with a dramatic late goal in the ninety-first minute. This defeat marked the end of Portugal's tournament and Ronaldo's final World Cup chapter.

title: Wayanad landslide: Death toll rises to 3, oppn alleges 'negligence' - top developments
content: A devastating landslide near the Wayanad tunnel construction site has claimed lives and injured several people. Rescue operations are ongoing for those still missing after the mudslide near Meenakshi Bridge. Videos captured the terrifying moments as mud and debris rushed downhill, engulfing vehicles. The state government alleges contractors ignored repeated safety warnings regarding excavated soil. Opposition leaders are calling for a thorough investigation into potential criminal negligence.

title: Ram Temple theft row: UP CM Yogi calls out Congress, SP with 'chameleon' dig
content: A day after the Ram Mandir Trust accepted the resignation of Champat Rai from the position of general secretary, Yogi accused the rival political parties, Congress and the Samajwadi Party, of "making a mockery of Hindu faith" -- the same allegation the opposition has been levelling against the BJP.  Yogi futher asked why the anti-NDA bloc remained muted when hectares of land across the nation were "sold off in the name of the Wakf".

title: 'Dance with me': Iran takes swipe at Trump as Belgium end US World Cup run
content: Belgium outplayed the hosts to book a place in the quarter-finals, with Charles De Ketelaere scoring twice and setting up another goal.

title: Pune realtor murder: Siya 'secretly' married Chetan months before killing Ketan
content: Police are investigating claims that Siya Goyal secretly married Chetan Chaudhary four months prior to the murder. This alleged marriage occurred after Goyal's engagement to businessman Ketan Agarwal. Investigators are verifying marriage registration and examining digital evidence for proof. Deleted photographs and chat messages are crucial elements in the ongoing probe.

title: Trump wants Nato to spend more on defence. Europe now has a plan to prove it can
content: NATO members are discussing defense spending at the Ankara summit amid US pressure. European nations and Canada have increased defense budgets since 2017. Four countries are developing a new financing model to speed up defense investments. Another proposal involves a bank to fund defense and security initiatives. These efforts aim to strengthen collective defense and support Ukraine's resistance.

title: Messi vs Salah: A look at their international numbers ahead of WC clash
content: Atlanta stages a blockbuster World Cup clash between Lionel Messi and Mohamed Salah, with only one advancing. Messi, 39, already a world champion, has seven goals in four matches, a record eight straight World Cup scoring games, and 124 goals in 203 Argentina appearances. Salah, 34, Egypt's talisman, has 66 goals in 118 caps and has led the Pharaohs to Cup milestones.

title: APREIS Secretary hails ZP High School in Nunna as model PM SHRI institution
content: The official reviews school’s infrastructure, including classrooms, laboratories and digital learning facilities and assesses academic standards, sports infrastructure and the functioning of the NCC and Scouts and Guides units

title: Panel on simultaneous polls unlikely to finalise report by Monsoon Session
content: The panel chairperson P.P. Chaudhary indicated that more consultations are in the offing before the report can be finalised; the panel is headed to Uttar Pradesh on July 9

title: Wayanad debris slip LIVE updates: At least three dead, five others missing as rescue efforts continue
content: ​The debris slip incident occurred near the Meenakshi Bridge at Kalladi; region braces for more rains

title: Madras HC orders notices to Aadhav Arjuna, E.V. Velu on petitions challenging their election
content: Justices D. Bharatha Chakravarthy and V. Lakshminarayanan pass the orders on a batch of election petitions listed before them

title: Local bodies in Kerala hit by funds crunch
content: The sharp fall in the Plan fund allocations in the Revised Budget presented by the United Democratic Front government is also of concern to local bodies

title: Ram temple donation row: Will respond after SIT files final report, says Champat Rai
content: In a handwritten letter addressed to the “devotees of Lord Ram”, Champat Rai said several “false narratives” and “baseless allegations” had been circulated against him since the alleged theft came to light on April 10, but he had maintained complete silence

title: PM in Indonesia highlights: Modi addresses Indian diaspora, says country moving forward with mantra of 'reform, perform and transform'
content: PM Modi conferred with Indonesia's highest honour ’Bintang Adipurna of the Republic of Indonesia’ medal

title: Monsoon tracker LIVE: Wayanad on red alert after three dead in debris slip; Mumbai gets respite after two days
content: The alert was issued at 12.30 p.m. after the landslip at the Kalladi tunnel project site in Wayanad at around 11 a.m. Meanwhile, officials said ten people had died in rain-related incidents across Maharashtra's Palghar since July 1

title: ‘Drugs abuse among youths alone can destroy nations’
content: Legal awareness and aid programme on drug abuse and the POCSO Act organised at the Yadgir Institute of Medical Sciences

title: Home Minister stresses proactive steps to mitigate El Niño impact
content: Anitha directs officials to strengthen preparedness as Andhra Pradesh braces for below-normal monsoon rainfall

title: Silk India exhibition in Hubballi
content: The exhibition and sale showcasing the rich heritage of India’s handloom, handicraft and textile traditions gets good response

title: CM to distribute pattadar passbooks at Banaganapalle on July 9
content: Chandrababu Naidu will hand over passbooks bearing the State emblem to the farmers and landowners in the villages where resurvey process has been completed

title: Wayanad debris slip: experts, residents blame poor safeguards
content: Expert describes the tragedy as an 'engineering failure-induced disaster’, arguing that extensive modifications to the terrain for the under-construction tunnel project had destabilised the slope

title: George says Hampi, Mysuru, Lakkundi will be developed as global tourism destinations
content: He says connectivity, private investment and infrastructure will come through the Centre’s Global Destination Development initiative

title: Avoid unnecessary inspections, says  CMO after backlash to video posted by Minister Keerthana
content: Minister for Law R. Nirmalkumar made the statement after the video of an inspection done by Industries Minister S. Keerthana at a government school in Sivakasi came in for severe criticism

title: Cyberabad Municipal Corporation to roll out bulky household, divine waste collection initiatives
content: Aim is to encourage scientific disposal of household and temple waste; collected materials will be processed through environmentally sustainable recycling and disposal mechanisms

title: Municipal workers demand jobs for kin of retired and deceased employees in Andhra Pradesh
content: They also demand the immediate release of pending Dearness Allowance (DA) arrears, leave encashment, and gratuity benefits for permanent municipal workers

title: A.P. SIPB clears 11 investment proposals worth ₹9,076 crore; CM calls for ethanol blending policy
content: Industrialisation should complement agriculture by creating additional income opportunities for farmers and enabling them to emerge as entrepreneurs, says Chandrababu Naidu

title: CBSE Skill Expo showcases student innovation in Visakhapatnam
content: Nearly 25 schools from across Andhra Pradesh participate in the event as students display around 60 exhibits on sustainability, entrepreneurship, agriculture, media and other themes

title: Wadakkanchery police jeep fined for missing documents; ‘excess’ penalty questioned
content: Police claim insurance was valid but not updated on portal; MVD says pollution certificate was missing and law applies equally to all

title: KU Syndicate cuts standing committees from 10 to seven; UDF secures all convenerships
content: This is for the first time since the University Act came into force in 1974 that the CPI(M) has not held a standing committee convenership in the Syndicate

title: Watch: Monsoon rains trigger deadly debris slip in Wayanad |Above the Fold | 07.07.2026
content: From Kerala to Indonesia, and from Syria to the FIFA World Cup, in this episode, we look at the deadly debris slip in Kerala, Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s visit to Indonesia, explosions in Syria during French President Emmanuel Macron’s trip, the Gujarat High Court’s ruling on the 2008 Ahmedabad blasts case, and more.

title: NCERT publishes revised Class 8 Social Science textbook, rewrites controversial chapter on judiciary
content: The controversial portions along with references to judicial backlog and two major court verdicts have been dropped; the revised textbook states in its acknowledgements that it has been published pursuant to the review process undertaken by complying with the Supreme Court’s directions

title: CPI(M) accuses Nara Lokesh of breaking housing promises in Mangalagiri
content: CPI(M) announces a protest march to his camp office on July 15, demands immediate distribution of house sites, ₹5 lakh financial assistance for house construction and alternative land for families displaced by eviction drives

title: Wayanad debris slip: Accurate weather forecasting still elusive in Wayanad
content: The weather conditions in Wayanad on the eve of the tragedy on July  7 were strikingly similar to those preceding the July 2024 disaster.  The catastrophic landslides then had claimed around 300 lives

title: Centre releases ₹2,545.50 crore to Andhra Pradesh under VB-G RAM G scheme
content: It will provide a new direction to rural development by strengthening durable infrastructure and expanding livelihood opportunities, says Union Minister Pemmasani Chandra Sekhar

title: Khamenei Will Be Regarded As Second Imam Hussain In 100 Years: Iran
content: Iranian foreign ministry spokesperson Esmail Baghaei said that people have been likening the leader's assassination to the martyrdom of Imam Hussain.

title: RBI Assessing Availability Amid Reports Of Cash Shortages At ATMs: Sources
content: The RBI has sought details of cash inventories at bank branches to establish whether banks have been recharging ATMs with adequate cash on time.

title: Meghalaya Church Leaders Meet Amit Shah Over Change In Foreign Exchange Act
content: The Home Minister, he said, assured the delegation that another meeting involving all stakeholders would be convened to further deliberate on the issues raised.

title: Taj Mahal Or Tejo Mahalaya? High Court Issues Notice To Centre On Petition
content: Lower courts had earlier rejected calls for a scientific evaluation and physical survey of the Taj's premises.

title: Trump's "I Like Her" Remark On Meloni Amid Spat, Then A 'No Help' Complaint
content: During a meeting with Turkish President Tayyip Erdogan, when a reporter asked Trump to clarify his social media post regarding the 'restraining order' post on Meloni, the US President said, "We had a bad relationship. It became a little bad because she refused to help us."

title: "Man-Made Disaster": 2 Kerala Ministers On Wayanad Landslide That Killed 5
content: "The government is investigating why mud taken out of the tunnel project was put there without any safety measure," Kerala Minister T Siddique said

title: Legs Bent At Unusual Angle: Man Who Found Delhi Newlywed's Body, Called Cops
content: Akriti Sutar was found dead after allegedly falling from the third floor of a building in the central Delhi neighbourhood

title: 'Laxity Allowed': Champat Rai Blames Bank For Ram Temple Donation Theft
content: Champat Rai claimed that the security guideline letter was written in haste, and he wasn't a signatory to it.

title: "It's A Great Plane": Trump Says US Will Consider Selling F-35 Jets To Turkey
content: Turkey has long sought to resolve the question of its readmittance to the F35 programme and the lifting of US sanctions that have soured ties and hampered Turkish defence projects, and has looked to Trump's visit to break the deadlock.

title: 'Car Manufacturers Comfortable, There's Some Misreporting': Hardeep Puri On E20 Row
content: The government has been promoting ethanol blending as part of its strategy to reduce crude oil imports, lower carbon emissions and support the domestic agricultural economy

title: 3 Tankers Attacked In Strait Of Hormuz In 24 Hours Amid US-Iran Ceasefire
content: One of the tankers caught fire after being attacked while travelling off the coast of Oman. Although theIranian state television said the liquefied natural gas tanker came under attack after ignoring warnings, it did not directly claim the assault.

title: India-Indonesia Ties And A Biju Patnaik Link: What PM Modi Said In Jakarta
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi has showered praise on Odisha's former Chief Minister Biju Patnaik, underscoring the role he had to play in the Independence movement of in Indonesia.

title: Jaipur Woman Kills Mother For Job, Property, Tries To Pass It Off As Road Accident
content: The accused, Ayushi, along with six others, including her uncle and cousin, have been arrested in connection with the case, while one accused is on the run, police said.

title: How AI Helped Maharashtra Stay Ahead Of Cloudburst-Like Rain In Nashik
content: Armed with Bharat Forecast System (BharatFS) -- India's next-generation high-resolution weather forecasting platform --Maharashtra's disaster management machinery received highly localised advance forecasts, indicating the possibility of cloudburst-like rainfall over Nashik district.

title: India, France Hold First Joint Working Group Meeting On Critical Minerals
content: The meeting comes as both countries seek to build resilient supply chains for resources essential to clean energy, advanced manufacturing and strategic industries.

title: BJP Names Abhishek Kumar As Candidate For Bihar's Bankipur Bypoll
content: The announcement was made through a statement released by the BJP National General Secretary and headquarters in-charge, Arun Singh.

title: Sun Knocks Out Surveillance Satellite, Bengaluru Startup Vows Comeback
content: GalaxEye has announced that communication with Mission Drishti, its satellite, was lost after the spacecraft encountered an anomaly following a geomagnetic solar storm.

title: Fresh Trouble For AIADMK As 2 Rebel MLAs Skip E Palaniswami's Key Meet
content: The cross-voting by the members enabled the ruling party to obtain 144 "ayes" in the 234-member Assembly, far above the simple majority of 118.

title: Bangladesh Wants To Strengthen Ties With India: PM Rahman's Top Adviser
content: Speaking on whether he will visit India after the incident at the airport, Zahed Ur Rahman said, "I will certainly go. I am making this very clear that if I receive a proper invitation, I will certainly go because I want to engage with India, logically and rationally."

title: How to witness the once-in-a-lifetime asteroid flyby on 13 April 2029
content: The TOI Science Desk stands as an inquisitive team of journalists, ceaselessly delving into the realms of discovery to curate a captivating collection of news, features, and articles from the vast and ever-evolving world of science for the readers of The Times of India. Consider us your scientific companion, delivering a daily dose of wonder and enlightenment. Whether it's the intricacies of genetic engineering, the marvels of space exploration, or the latest in artificial intelligence, the TOI Science Desk ensures you stay connected to the pulse of the scientific world. At the TOI Science Desk, we are not just reporters; we are storytellers of scientific narratives. We are committed to demystifying the intricacies of science, making it accessible and engaging for readers of all backgrounds. Join us as we craft knowledge with precision and passion, bringing you on a journey where the mysteries of the universe unfold with every word. Read More

title: Trump admin eyes tighter H-1B, green card rules; Indians could be most affected
content: Lubna Kably is a senior editor, who focuses on various policies and legislation. In particular, she writes extensively on immigration and tax policies. The Indian diaspora is the largest in the world; through her articles she demystifies the immigration-policy related developments in select countries for outbound students, job aspirants and employees. She also analyses the impact of Income-tax and GST related developments for individuals and business entities. Read More

content: The TOI News Desk comprises a dedicated and tireless team of journalists who operate around the clock to deliver the most current and comprehensive news and updates to the readers of The Times of India worldwide. With an unwavering commitment to excellence in journalism, our team is at the forefront of gathering, verifying, and presenting breaking news, in-depth analysis, and insightful reports on a wide range of topics.
